message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate mod_helper bracket patterns to structured helpers

- binop: emit("(") + emit(")") → withParensCtx
- shift: nested emit("(")/@intCast → withParensCtx + emitCallCtx
- typeTest: double parens → nested withParensCtx
- memOrder: emit("std.mem.order(") → emitCallCtx
- builtin1, stdmath1, stdmathT, stdmath2: function calls → nested emitCallCtx
- methods/file.zig: genFileClose → emitCallCtx
- secrets_mod.zig: emitNbytes @intCast → emitCallCtx
